metadata.title: FDIC Aggregate US Banking Industry Time Series (all FDIC-insured institutions)
metadata.primary_source: FDIC BankFind Suite financial data API: https://api.fdic.gov/banks/financials (formerly https://banks.data.fdic.gov/api/financials)
metadata.units: All *_usd fields in nominal US dollars. Industry aggregates computed by summing per-institution call-report values (reported by FDIC in $thousands) across every insured institution for the quarter.
methodology_notes: unrealized_secs_usd computed from API as SUM[(SCAF - SCAA) + (SCHF - SCHA)] = AFS fair value minus AFS amortized cost, plus HTM fair value minus HTM amortized cost. Validated against FDIC QBP: API 2026Q1 -$325.3B vs QBP -$325.1B; 2025Q4 -$306.2B vs QBP -$306.1B.
unrealized_secs_qbp_usd is FDIC's officially published headline figure for cross-check.
roa_pct = SUM(NETINCQ)*4 / SUM(ASSET); nim_pct = SUM(NIMQ)*4 / SUM(ERNAST). Slightly differ from QBP which uses average assets/earning assets (period-average denominators).
cre_loans_usd = construction & land development (LNRECONS) + nonfarm nonresidential RE (LNRENRES, owner + non-owner-occupied).
cre_nonowner_construction_usd = construction (LNRECONS) + non-owner-occupied nonfarm nonresidential (LNRENROT) -- the investor/riskier CRE slice.
cre_noncurrent_pct = (NCRECONS + NCRENRES) / cre_loans * 100 (noncurrent = 90+ days past due plus nonaccrual).
Problem Bank List asset totals are null from 2025Q1 onward: FDIC stopped disclosing them in Feb 2025 (Acting Chairman Travis Hill).
net_income_q_usd is quarterly net income (NETINCQ). 2023Q4 ROA depressed by the FDIC special assessment for the 2023 systemic-risk-exception (SVB/Signature) losses.
